title: Man page missing for podman trust show
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**

We've no man page for `podman trust show` and need one.

comments.body:
man podman-image-trust
We don't have a podman trust command.
I'm going to reopen this one, yes we've the man page for this and the other two, but they're not listed on podman(1) and should be.

We don't currently list the subcommands of subcommands in podman man page.

podman container exists for example is not listed.
They are listed under podman trust not in podman, but trust is listed under podman man page.
